module.name: sort-imports
module.description: Require import declarations to be grouped (side-effect -> builtin -> external -> parent -> peer -> index) and sorted alphabetically within each group.

scenarios.name: should allow imports ordered side-effect, then builtin, then external, then local
scenarios.given: a module with 'reflect-metadata' then 'node:path' then 'lodash' then './local' imports
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declarations

scenarios.name: should allow alphabetically sorted imports within the same group
scenarios.given: two external imports 'axios' then 'lodash' in the same group
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declarations

specifications.feature: Imports in the wrong group order

scenarios.name: should report an external import placed before a builtin import
scenarios.given: import 'lodash' appears before import 'node:path' in the source
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declarations

scenarios.name: should report imports within the same group that are not alphabetically sorted
scenarios.given: import 'lodash' appears before import 'axios' in the external group
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declarations

scenarios.name: should report a local import placed before an external import
scenarios.given: import './local' appears before import 'lodash' in the source
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declarations
